# Software Specification Document Review

Given the context discussed here so far, read thoroughly the Software Specification Document (SSD) `.memo/CE/specs/SSD.md` again and provide feedbacks on the following review areas. Write your review as `/.memo/CE/specs/SSD-review-{date}.md`. Include suggestions for improvements, changes, or further clarification where necessary.

## Review Areas

1. Format Consistency: Check for consistent terminology, formatting, and style throughout the document.
2. Contents Consistency: Ensure that all contents in all sections are coherent, logically structured, and not contradictory to each other.
